description: Repro of an auth-bypass incident: a permission check is short-circuited so an unauthenticated caller reaches a privileged path. The security-auth lens must catch it and block.

evidence_trace: src/auth/middleware.ts:57 changes the guard from `if (!user.isAdmin) return 403` to `if (!user.isAdmin) {}`
the empty body means the admin check no longer short-circuits the handler
downstream handler mutates billing settings without any remaining authorization gate
finding.model_authored_prose: The admin guard here no longer returns on failure, so a non-admin reaches the privileged handler. Restore the early `return 403` when `!user.isAdmin`.
